description.en: Independent contractors using their own vehicles. Drivers receive fare minus 15-30% Uber commission, get peak-time surge bonuses, and choose their own hours. Driver-side classification (contractor vs employee) is the structural legal risk — California's AB5 (2019) and the UK Supreme Court ruling (2021) both pushed back. The driver side is the supply-driven cost — higher driver share = better service but lower platform margin.
description.zh: 独立承包者,使用自己的车辆。司机拿到车费扣除 15-30% Uber 佣金后的部分,高峰期有 Surge 加成,可以自己选工作时间。司机的法律分类(承包者还是雇员)是结构性的法律风险 —— 加州 AB5 法案(2019)与英国最高法院判决(2021)都对这一点反推。司机侧是供给驱动的成本 —— 给司机的分成越高,服务越好,但平台毛利越低。
